original: Paragon Inc. understands that in today’s high-intensity society, sensation can prove overwhelming - or even paralyzing! For the discerning user struggling to withstand the crass attentions of Utopian Skies employees and the tainted tapwater Bright Water peddles, a sensory dampening system goes a long way toward improving peace of mind. With the base demands of the body minimized, you too can be free to make intelligent, well-reasoned choices. As an added bonus, mild hand numbness makes kitchen work a breeze!
